title: Administrative Assistant
description:
🧩 JobResponsibilities

  1. Responsible for daily administrative, maintenance, and operational support for related companies;
  2. Assist with the incorporation, maintenance, and compliance matters of local and offshore entities (such as BVI and Cayman);
  3. Coordinate and liaise with third-party professional service providers to complete the opening, ongoing liaison, and maintenance of company banking, securities, and custodial accounts;
  4. Manage, organize, and maintain documentation for multiple companies, ensuring completeness and compliance;
  5. Report work progress to the direct supervisor and gradually develop the ability to independently handle and resolve related matters.

👤 JobRequirements

✅ MandatoryRequirements

  1. Strong sense of responsibility: Highly responsible, detail-oriented, and accountable for work outcomes;
  2. Execution & efficiency: Strong execution capability with high efficiency, able to deliver high-quality results within given timelines;
  3. Flexibility: Able to provide necessary support outside regular working hours when required by the company;
  4. Professional ethics: High level of professional integrity, capable of handling sensitive company and entity-related information appropriately.

⭐ PreferredQualifications (Nice to Have)

  1. Learning & problem-solving ability: Strong ability to work independently and resolve issues; work capability and efficiency are core evaluation criteria for this role;
  2. Language skills: Proficient in both English and Chinese, able to use both as working languages;
  3. Relevant experience: More than 3 years of experience in administration, operations, company incorporation, or banking/securities account coordination is preferred;
  4. Work methodology: Logical, structured approach to work with strong task decomposition and execution skills;
  5. Communication skills: Strong communication skills, able to efficiently coordinate with internal and external stakeholders.

💼Compensation

  • Candidates with relevant experience: From SGD 3,500-6,500 (candidates meeting 3 or more preferred qualifications will be considered experienced);
  • Fresh university graduates: From SGD 3,000;
  • Final compensation will be determined based on experience and overall capability.
  • Performance-based bonus equivalent to 1–6 months of salary, subject to individual and company performance.


📌 Additional Information

  • Start Date: Immediate availability preferred (ASAP)
  • This position is limited to 2 hires, selection will be made on a merit basis;
  • Outstanding fresh university graduates are encouraged to apply.
